Anthony Stevens Back to Portfolio
Documentation

How Everything
Was Built

A transparent look at every project, feature, and technical decision on this site — including the problems encountered and how they were solved.

Available Documentation

Smart Document Summariser

Live

How the AI powered document summariser was built using Django, the Anthropic Claude API, PyPDF2, and python-docx. Includes file handling, prompt engineering, and deployment.

Python Django Claude API PyPDF2

Authentication System

Live

How the site wide user authentication system was built using Django's built in auth framework, PostgreSQL hosted on Neon, session based usage tracking, and a 3 free uses guest tier.

Django Auth PostgreSQL Neon Sessions

Cookie Consent & Data Privacy

Live

How the cookie consent system was built to comply with UK PECR and UK GDPR — including dynamic reCAPTCHA loading, localStorage for consent storage, and why third party scripts require explicit user consent.

JavaScript PECR UK GDPR reCAPTCHA
